overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring an abandoned rural manor during a rainy night. The character approaches stone ruins holding a torch, enters to explore the candlelit wooden interior, and exits back into the stormy countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned rural path approaching stone ruins

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along a dirt path through rainy countryside, holding a torch to light the way toward ancient stone ruins

entered.detail: tall leafy tree with dense foliage silhouetted against the dark sky
large weathered stone archway marking the entrance to the ruins
crumbling stone walls of abandoned structures overgrown with vegetation
muddy dirt trail winding through the rural landscape

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through a rainy, overcast countryside toward an ancient stone archway. The environment is open with scattered trees and ruined walls visible, illuminated by the torch he carries.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to manor entrance

events.description: passing through the stone archway into the enclosed ruin area
entering the wooden door of the abandoned manor building

agents.ego_description: Geralt passes through the stone archway and climbs the weathered stone staircase toward the manor entrance

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading upward to the building entrance
tall stone walls flanking the staircase on both sides
abandoned stone manor with tower structure and wooden entrance
dark wooden doorway serving as entrance to the interior

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone archway, Geralt ascends a weathered stone staircase flanked by walls, approaching the entrance of an abandoned stone manor. The sky remains overcast as he reaches the wooden door.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned rustic interior with wooden beams

events.description: turning left to examine side room with wooden table and scattered items
turning right to continue exploring through the main hall

agents.ego_description: Geralt explores the dimly lit interior rooms, examining rustic furniture and scattered belongings by torchlight

entered.detail: aged wooden plank flooring worn by time and weather
tall wooden shelving units holding various pottery and items
rustic wooden table with clay pots and scattered objects
lit candles providing warm flickering light in the darkness
decorative woven rug lying on the wooden floor
wooden bunk beds with straw mattresses against the wall
exposed wooden ceiling beams supporting the roof structure

segments.scene_description: Inside the dimly lit manor, Geralt explores rustic rooms with wooden floors and beams. Candlelight and his torch illuminate scattered furniture, shelves, and bunk beds as he moves through the abandoned interior, examining the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: exiting manor back to rainy countryside

events.description: exiting the manor building back into the rainy outdoor environment

agents.ego_description: Geralt exits the building and descends the stone steps, continuing along the dirt path away from the ruins

entered.detail: stone steps leading downward from the manor entrance
leafy trees surrounding the path in the countryside

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the manor through the doorway, descending the stone steps back into the rainy night. He passes through the archway once more and continues along the dirt path away from the ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy, open countryside into the sheltered interior of an abandoned manor before returning to the stormy night. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path through an overcast landscape, guided by the glow of a torch toward an ancient stone archway. As he passes through the arch, the camera ascends a weathered stone staircase that leads directly to the wooden door of the manor. The scene then shifts from the damp exterior to a dimly lit interior of rustic rooms, where candlelight illuminates wooden beams, bunk beds, and scattered furniture. Finally, the camera follows Geralt as he exits the building, descending the stone steps and passing back through the archway to continue along the rainy path away from the ruins.
